tracks.rawText: 3:22[Rec] Feb 15 16:49:35 (Remastered)v5CoverPulsating four-on-the-floor kick anchors the deep techno house groove, layered with lush pads, percussive hi-hats, and syncopated claps, Subtle basslines interlace with minimal melodic motifs, rising into atmospheric breakdowns before the beat drops back to an entrancing, hypnotic flowPublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 2:30[Rec] Feb 15 16:49:35 (Remastered)v5Upbeat and energetic pop-rock anthem with a driving 4/4 rhythm at approximately 124 BPM, The track features bright, overdriven electric guitar riffs, a punchy bassline, and a crisp drum kit with a prominent snare, The arrangement follows a classic verse-chorus structure, building tension with palm-muted guitars in the verses and exploding into a wide, layered sound in the chorus, The male lead vocal is powerful and melodic, utilizing a slight rasp in the higher register for emotional impact, Production is polished with modern compression, subtle reverb on the vocals, and wide stereo panning for the rhythm guitars, The harmonic progression is centered around a major key, utilizing common pop-rock power chords to create a sense of optimism and movementPublishRemix
